case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. SABRINA WHITE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, SABRINA NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, SABRINA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
